members.name: John Andrew Balbarosa
members.bio: Computer Science at FEU Tech. Owns the algorithm and the C++ pattern-detection microservice — parsing, hashing, pattern dispatch, evidence emission. Believes in deterministic structural detection before any AI step. Spends his off-hours on CTF and certification grinds because he likes proof, not vibes.
skills: Trend Micro University CTF — preliminary round participant

highlights.caption: TOPCIT Level 3 passers list — Computer Science track, FEU Tech ACM.
Trend Micro University CTF — preliminary round certificate, Aug 22 2025.
NASA International Space Apps Challenge 2024 — Galactic Problem Solver.
Hack & Yap with the Pizza & Friends Tech Community at Coffee Chapters.
Thesis working session with the research team and adviser.
Thesis title meeting with Collin Andrei Yapchulay and Josephine Santander.

members.name: Miryl de Leon
members.bio: Computer Science at FEU Tech. Owns the pattern catalog and the study-design loop — what gets measured, how readers actually behave, and where the evidence lives. Keeps the catalog honest and the research instruments aligned across iterations.

members.name: Josephine Santander
members.bio: Computer Science at FEU Tech. Leads the thesis documentation track for CodiNeo — covering the written narrative, study artifacts, and user-facing copy that ships alongside the analyzer. Keeps the project's external voice consistent across the docs site, the printed thesis, and the research write-ups.
skills: Technical writing · thesis chapters + docs site
